narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: The demand for advanced AI chips and related hardware continues to drive significant growth for semiconductor companies, with Micron hitting a $1 trillion market cap and AMD outperforming.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
Micron or Nvidia earnings miss
Expansion of China export controls to HBM

sources.title: Micron hits $1 trillion market cap for the first time as stock surges 18%
AMD Is Up 5% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Chip Stocks Like Intel and NVIDIA?
Seaport Research Says Rising Data Center Power Needs Could Boost Texas Instruments (TXN)
Micron Stock Gets Big Price-Target Hike, Hits Record High

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The strong demand for GLP-1 drugs for obesity and related conditions continues to drive significant sales growth and positive sentiment for leading pharmaceutical companies.
watchFor: New clinical trial data shows unexpected side effects for GLP-1 drugs
Increased regulatory scrutiny on GLP-1 drug pricing
Significant competitive entry from a new class of obesity drugs

sources.title: Novo Nordisk A/S - share repurchase programme
Can EU Label Expansions of NVO's GLP-1 Drugs Spur Sales Growth?

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, driving growth for companies providing these platforms and services.
watchFor: Major cloud providers report slowing AI revenue growth
Enterprise software spending surveys show deceleration
Increased competition leading to price wars in AI software

sources.title: Snowflake’s OneGov Deal Puts AI Data Platform In Federal Spotlight

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Demand Boost
narratives.thesis: Growing AI-driven threats and the need for robust digital defenses are fueling demand for cybersecurity solutions, benefiting key players in the space.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breaches impacting leading vendors
Corporate IT budget cuts impacting security spending
New, disruptive open-source security tools gaining traction

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Payment processing companies are expanding their instant payment solutions, indicating continued growth and innovation in digital transactions.

Increased regulatory pressure on payment processing fees
New fintech entrants disrupting traditional payment networks

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major internet content and information platforms continue to demonstrate strength, with AI advancements further solidifying their market position and driving investor interest.

Significant slowdown in digital advertising spend
New antitrust regulations targeting large tech platforms

narratives.name: Computer Hardware AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Traditional computer hardware companies are benefiting from the integration of AI capabilities into their products and the broader AI-driven growth cycle.
watchFor: Dell's Q1 earnings miss expectations
Slowdown in enterprise PC refresh cycle
Increased competition from white-box AI server manufacturers

sources.title: Stocks to Watch: Ferrari, Dell, Marvell Technology

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Gold ETFs are seeing renewed interest as ceasefire hopes lift market optimism, positioning gold as a potential safe-haven asset.
watchFor: Global geopolitical tensions ease significantly
US Dollar strengthens considerably
Real interest rates rise unexpectedly

sources.title: Gold ETFs Shine Again as Ceasefire Hopes Lift Market Optimism

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: Disney is demonstrating strength with successful content releases and positive developments at its theme parks, indicating a rebound in entertainment spending.

Major theme park attendance declines unexpectedly
Increased competition from new streaming services

narratives.name: Information Technology Services AI Adoption
narratives.thesis: IT services firms are seeing increased demand as clients seek to implement and integrate AI solutions, driving new consulting and implementation projects.

Increased pricing pressure in IT consulting due to AI tools
Major clients insourcing AI implementation rather than outsourcing

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions and ongoing defense needs continue to support strong demand and order backlogs for aerospace and defense contractors.

Defense budget cuts announced by major governments
General Dynamics reports lower-than-expected new orders

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified Regulatory Clarity
narratives.thesis: Some diversified banks are receiving positive analyst attention and benefiting from broader market movements, despite a lack of direct, specific news.

New banking regulations increase compliance costs
Significant slowdown in global financial markets

narratives.name: Discount Stores Resilience
narratives.thesis: Walmart is being recognized for its dividend stability and resilience, making it an attractive option for long-term investors despite broader market fluctuations.

Increased competition from online retailers impacting market share

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist

Housing starts data shows significant decline
Lennar's next earnings report indicates slowing orders

narratives.name: Silver Watchlist

Technology.thesis: The Technology sector continues to be driven by the insatiable demand for AI infrastructure and software, with strong performance in semiconductors and related services. Despite some valuation concerns, the underlying growth drivers remain robust.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Core CPI print > 0.4% MoM for two consecutive months — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, hurting growth stocks
Significant slowdown in enterprise software spending reported by major vendors

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: The Consumer Cyclical sector is showing mixed signals. While some areas like entertainment are seeing a resurgence, others like retail face ongoing pressures. Residential construction is showing some resilience.
watchFor: Consumer confidence index drops below 90
Retail sales data shows persistent month-over-month declines
Interest rate hikes resume, impacting housing and discretionary spending

Communication Services.thesis: The Communication Services sector is mixed, with digital content and advertising showing some resilience, but overall sentiment is tempered by broader market dynamics and specific company challenges.
watchFor: Major advertising agencies report significant declines in Q2 bookings
Subscription streaming services report net subscriber losses
Regulatory actions against large tech platforms impacting content monetization

Industrials.thesis: The Industrials sector is showing mixed signals. Aerospace & Defense continues to benefit from geopolitical tensions, while other sub-industries have limited specific catalysts.
watchFor: De-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts
Significant cuts in government defense spending budgets
Global trade tensions escalate, impacting freight and machinery demand

Healthcare.thesis: Healthcare is mixed; GLP-1 drug manufacturers are experiencing strong growth and positive catalysts, while other areas like medical devices face some headwinds and healthcare plans are under scrutiny.
watchFor: New GLP-1 drug entrants significantly increase competition and pressure pricing
FDA announces unexpected safety concerns for a major GLP-1 drug
Government policy changes impacting drug pricing or healthcare plan reimbursements

Financials.thesis: The Financials sector is mixed, with credit services showing strength and some banks benefiting from analyst upgrades, while asset management faces valuation concerns and broader market uncertainty.
watchFor: Federal Reserve signals a return to rate hikes
Significant increase in corporate or consumer loan defaults
New regulatory proposals impacting bank capital requirements

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The Consumer Defensive sector is mixed. Discount stores show resilience, but the broader sector lacks strong, clear narratives beyond individual company performance.
watchFor: Unexpected decline in consumer staples spending
Inflationary pressures significantly erode consumer purchasing power
Major discount retailers report slowing sales growth

Utilities.thesis: The Utilities sector currently lacks strong, specific narratives driving capital flows, with most news being company-specific or unrelated to broader sector trends.
watchFor: Sudden spike in natural gas prices impacting power producers
Major policy shifts favoring or disfavoring renewable energy
Interest rates rise significantly, increasing borrowing costs for capital-intensive utilities

Basic Materials.thesis: The Basic Materials sector is largely neutral, with some focus on rare earth elements due to geopolitical dynamics, but no strong, overarching narrative.
watchFor: Significant shift in global trade policies impacting raw material demand
New discoveries of critical minerals altering supply dynamics
Escalation or de-escalation of geopolitical tensions impacting resource access

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals, particularly gold, are benefiting from renewed market optimism driven by ceasefire hopes and a search for safe-haven assets amidst global uncertainties.
watchFor: Significant de-escalation of global geopolitical tensions
Stronger-than-expected economic data leading to hawkish Fed stance
Sustained appreciation of the US Dollar
